posts.description: Most Notion form tools make you manually type column names, set up Zapier, or deal with messy exports. Rowdrop skips all of that. Paste your Notion database ID, load your columns automatically, share a link. Every submission becomes a new row in your database instantly no middleman, no backend, no exports. Free plan included. 7-day Pro trial, no credit card required.
